name: Elasticsearch + Kibana
description: A distributed, RESTful search and analytics engine bundled with Kibana — the visualization and exploration UI for querying indices, building dashboards and tracing logs.

aws.parity: Amazon OpenSearch Service is a managed fork of Elasticsearch — the same query DSL, index mappings and REST API work on both.
aws.deploy: Create an Amazon OpenSearch domain and update your endpoint to point at its HTTPS address; index and search calls are wire-compatible.

variables.label: Elasticsearch Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine for the Elasticsearch HTTP API.

variables.label: Kibana Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Kibana web UI.

variables.label: Elastic Password
variables.description: Password for the built-in 'elastic' superuser account.
